conceptClusters.title: Retrieved boundaries paths and alternatives
exitEvidence: Learner retrieves external-resource ownership boundaries, portable URL resolution, and purpose-based poster or fallback image alternatives before time-based media.
Learner repairs a moved media resource, wrong replaced-content assumption, and changed image purpose without copying earlier media work.

conceptClusters.title: Native media sources and control
exitEvidence: Learner builds native audio and video with user controls, suitable sources, bounded loading choices, video dimensions and poster where justified, and useful fallback links.
Learner verifies keyboard control, source selection, play pause seek volume state, autoplay refusal, slow and missing resources, and changed-source behavior without claiming browser guarantees.

conceptClusters.title: Timed media equivalence
exitEvidence: Learner selects captions, transcript, video-only equivalent, and visual-description plan from audio-only, video-only, synchronized, live, prerecorded, language, and interaction context.
Learner verifies track kind, source, language, label, default choice, cue timing, speaker and non-speech content, transcript access, visual information, and changed media cases.

conceptClusters.title: Embedded document boundaries
exitEvidence: Learner refuses unnecessary third-party embedding and otherwise supplies accurate purpose title, exact source and origin awareness, minimal sandbox and permission capabilities, bounded referrer and loading choices, and responsive box expectations.

Learner verifies outer document, embedded document, accessible name, origin, network and storage exposure, granted capabilities, navigation, loading and unreliable failure-event boundaries under changed trust.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A worked complete document gains user-controlled native video, purpose-specific timed alternatives, useful fallback, and one constrained embedded document with synchronized technical, accessibility, privacy, and failure evidence.
activityDesigns.startingState: A complete document, owned media fixtures, deterministic media and iframe responses, player inspector, cue timeline, transcript audit, accessibility tree, and permission monitor are synchronized.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner explains six contrasts without equating external content with child DOM, source strings with requests, poster alt with media equivalence, autoplay with access, subtitles with captions, or iframe title with inner-page title.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback contrasts prediction with DOM ownership, URL, network, media state, controls, cue, transcript, accessibility, origin, sandbox, permission, referrer, navigation, and failure evidence.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Worked guidance reveals one evidence layer only after learner commits a boundary, control, equivalence, or embed prediction.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss replays a smaller changed media case and requires the earliest wrong assumption before continuing.

interactions.title: Retrieve media resource boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Predict DOM ownership, resolved source, request, intrinsic media data, player box, poster purpose, and fallback boundaries for video and iframe fixtures.
interactions.artifactChange: A prerequisite media prediction is committed.

evidence.observable: DOM, URL, request, decoded resource, box, poster alternative, and external document ownership agree.
evidence.changedCase: Video source moves and iframe origin changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered media is treated as child DOM or poster as transcript.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace ownership, source, and purpose separately.

interactions.title: Predict native control behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source choice, controls, focus, play, pause, seek, volume, autoplay, muted, preload, loading, ready state, poster, and fallback outcomes.
interactions.artifactChange: A fourteen-part player prediction is locked.

evidence.observable: Parsed attributes, requests, media states, input control, user-agent limits, and fallback stay distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Autoplay loses muted, loading becomes lazy, and source support changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute presence is treated as guaranteed playback.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect user control, policy, and media state.

interactions.title: Inspect source and fallback pipeline
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect source candidates, media types, selected resource, request, metadata, duration, ready state, error, native controls, fallback links, and changed failure.
interactions.artifactChange: A native player pipeline is annotated.

evidence.observable: Selection, loading, playback, control, and unsupported-element fallback boundaries have direct evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Preferred source becomes unsupported and backup response fails.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First source tag or visible player proves usable media.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace candidate selection through user control.

interactions.title: Predict timed alternatives
interactions.learnerAction: Choose alternatives for prerecorded audio-only, video-only, synchronized dialogue, meaningful non-speech audio, essential visuals, live media, and text-alternative media.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven equivalence predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each choice follows content type, timing, task, language, interaction, and conformance context.
evidence.changedCase: Silent video gains dialogue and a text-based lesson becomes media.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Transcript or burned subtitles are universal alternatives.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify audio, visual, timing, and interaction information.

interactions.title: Inspect caption and transcript evidence
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect track kind, URL, language, label, default, cue timing, speaker, speech, non-speech audio, transcript structure, visual details, and access path.
interactions.artifactChange: A timed-equivalence trace is saved.

evidence.observable: Selectable synchronized cues and complete navigable transcript preserve distinct information roles.
evidence.changedCase: Cue timing, speaker, language, and essential visual action change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Track presence or dialogue-only subtitles pass.
interactions.correctionRoute: Verify every cue and information channel.

interactions.title: Explain constrained embed boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Explain iframe source, outer element, embedded document, purpose title, origin, sandbox restrictions, lifted capabilities, permissions policy, referrer, loading, box, navigation, and failure signals.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete embed boundary map is saved.

evidence.observable: Every capability, data exposure, document ownership, and diagnostic limit maps to direct evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Trusted same-origin fixture becomes untrusted cross-origin and requests camera permission.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Title changes inner page or sandbox equals complete safety.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace document, origin, restriction, and capability separately.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An oral-history exhibit gains owned user-controlled audio and video, verified captions and transcripts, useful fallbacks, purpose-specific posters, and one constrained same-origin exhibit embed.
activityDesigns.startingState: A complete exhibit document, owned media and poster fixtures, source and transcript fact packet, WebVTT fixtures, deterministic failures, and controlled embed capability manifest are supplied.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved exhibit passes resource, boundary, poster-purpose, player control, source, fallback, timed-equivalence, cue, transcript, embed-title, origin, sandbox, permission, privacy, loading, failure, and changed-case checks.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names failed source, player state, input, cue, transcript, alternative, title, origin, capability, data-exposure, navigation, loading, or failure observable without writing final code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Guided hints move from evidence layer to a smaller parallel oral-history case and only then to source location or syntax.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires prediction, minimal repair, direct evidence, and a changed interview case before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Resolve oral-history resources
interactions.learnerAction: Predict audio, video, poster, track, transcript, fallback, and iframe URLs from exhibit and nested interview document bases.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven resource predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Every source resolves to intended owned fixture or document without machine paths.
evidence.changedCase: Interview page and track move in opposite directions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Project root or media folder becomes universal base.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve from each exact document URL.

interactions.title: Inspect media ownership boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect audio, video, poster, track, transcript, and iframe ownership across DOM nodes, requested resources, decoded content, player box, and embedded document.
interactions.artifactChange: Six media boundary records are annotated.

evidence.observable: Document children, external resources, shadow controls, fallback, and embedded-document boundaries stay distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Video becomes audio-only and external embed becomes same-origin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Player controls or inner document are treated as authored child DOM.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect node and resource ownership.

interactions.title: Classify poster and fallback image purpose
interactions.learnerAction: Classify interview poster, decorative waveform, functional play graphic, speaker portrait, and transcript icon from exact context and fallback task.
interactions.artifactChange: Five image-purpose predictions are saved.

evidence.observable: Each alternative or exclusion preserves image-contributed information or function without replacing timed media alternatives.
evidence.changedCase: Speaker portrait becomes linked and poster gains essential text.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Poster alt is treated as video transcript or every image literal.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify image purpose separately from media content.

interactions.title: Predict source selection
interactions.learnerAction: Predict selected audio and video source from ordered candidates, declared types, browser support, response success, and changed format availability.
interactions.artifactChange: Six source-selection predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Candidate type, support, request, response, selected current source, and failure evidence agree.
evidence.changedCase: Preferred type becomes unsupported and backup response changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: First source always wins or extension proves support.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace candidates through support and response.

interactions.title: Author native interview players
interactions.learnerAction: Build audio and video elements with native controls, ordered suitable sources, useful fallback links, and video dimensions where verified.
interactions.artifactChange: Two user-controlled interview players become operable.

evidence.observable: DOM, source selection, controls, focus, playback, dimensions, fallback, and reload checks pass.
evidence.changedCase: Audio gains a backup source and video dimensions change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible player or source tag count passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test user control and selected resource.

interactions.title: Test player keyboard control
interactions.learnerAction: Reach and operate native controls by keyboard, then verify visible focus, play, pause, seek, volume, mute, elapsed state, and no keyboard trap.
interactions.artifactChange: A keyboard player trace is stored.

evidence.observable: Every essential playback function remains user controlled and state changes are observable.
evidence.changedCase: Pointer is unavailable and playback resumes from changed position.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Pointer playback or autoplay substitutes for keyboard control.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test focus and each essential state transition.

interactions.title: Predict boolean playback values
interactions.learnerAction: Predict autoplay, controls, muted, loop, and invalid false-string outcomes from boolean attribute presence and user-agent policy.
interactions.artifactChange: Five boolean behavior predictions are locked.

evidence.observable: Parsed presence, media state, playback policy, user preference, and actual outcome stay distinct.
evidence.changedCase: autoplay false remains present, muted is removed, and policy blocks play.

interactions.feedbackTarget: autoplay false is assumed disabled or presence guarantees play.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect boolean presence and allowed-to-play state.

interactions.title: Test preload and loading boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Change preload, loading, viewport position, autoplay, user activation, and source size while recording request timing, metadata, ready state, and playback.
interactions.artifactChange: Six loading-policy mutations are recorded.

evidence.observable: Author hint, lazy deferral, browser policy, request timing, ready state, and user control remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Deep video becomes primary after fragment navigation.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Preload or loading presence is an exact network guarantee.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect actual request and media state.

interactions.title: Author useful video poster
interactions.learnerAction: Add a verified owned poster with purpose-specific alternative treatment, accurate dimensions, and no claim that poster replaces video equivalence.
interactions.artifactChange: Video gains an evidence-backed loading poster.

evidence.observable: Poster request, rendered pre-play state, image purpose, player label, video alternatives, and failure remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Poster becomes decorative after nearby speaker text is added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Poster is transcript, caption, or player name.
interactions.correctionRoute: Separate image purpose from timed media content.

interactions.title: Test native player failures
interactions.learnerAction: Run unsupported source, failed response, corrupt metadata, stalled load, missing poster, disabled controls, and unsupported-element fallback cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven media failure fixtures join exhibit tests.

evidence.observable: Each earliest failure, user-control consequence, fallback path, and recovery is causally identified.
evidence.changedCase: Faults exchange sources and controls are restored after failure.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All player failures are called codec or path errors.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace selection, request, state, and control separately.

interactions.title: Classify interview media types
interactions.learnerAction: Classify prerecorded audio-only, video-only, synchronized, live, interactive, and clearly labeled text-alternative media before choosing equivalence work.
interactions.artifactChange: Six media-type predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each classification follows available audio, visuals, timing, interaction, and source role.
evidence.changedCase: Silent film gains narration and audio gains timed interaction.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All media is treated as captioned video.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory information channels and timing.

interactions.title: Plan interview alternatives
interactions.learnerAction: Choose captions, transcript, video-only equivalent, visual-description plan, or clearly labeled media-alternative treatment for six interview cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Six alternative plans are committed.

evidence.observable: Plan preserves speech, non-speech audio, essential visuals, interaction, order, and language.
evidence.changedCase: Essential on-screen text and non-speech audio are added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One transcript or burned subtitle is universal.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map every information channel to an equivalent.

interactions.title: Author caption track metadata
interactions.learnerAction: Add caption track with exact source, kind, source language, human-readable label, and intentional default behavior for the interview video.
interactions.artifactChange: Video gains a selectable caption track contract.

evidence.observable: Parsed track, request, kind, language, label, mode, default, and player selection pass.
evidence.changedCase: Caption language and default choice change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Track presence or file extension passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect parsed track and player selection.

interactions.title: Author complete caption cues
interactions.learnerAction: Write synchronized cues for speakers, dialogue, meaningful sound effects, music, laughter, pauses, and location without obscuring key visuals.
interactions.artifactChange: Interview gains complete timed captions.

evidence.observable: Cue syntax, order, timing, active text, speaker, speech, non-speech audio, and placement checks pass.
evidence.changedCase: Speaker overlap, music cue, and timing all change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Dialogue-only subtitles are called captions.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit all needed audio information and timing.

interactions.title: Test caption timing and selection
interactions.learnerAction: Enable, disable, switch language, seek, change playback position, and inspect active cues, overlap, gaps, labels, readability, and visual obstruction.
interactions.artifactChange: A caption playback matrix is stored.

evidence.observable: Selectable cues remain synchronized, complete, readable, and correctly labeled across changes.
evidence.changedCase: Cue boundaries and essential on-screen location change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid WebVTT or one screenshot proves captions.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test cue state throughout playback.

interactions.title: Build navigable interview transcript
interactions.learnerAction: Build a structured transcript containing speakers, spoken words, meaningful sounds, sequence, relevant visual information, and links to referenced resources.
interactions.artifactChange: Audio and video gain an accessible transcript path.

evidence.observable: Transcript is discoverable, ordered, complete, language-correct, navigable, and useful without playback.
evidence.changedCase: A new visual-only demonstration and resource reference are added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Raw dialogue dump or caption copy is automatically complete.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit all information channels and document use.

interactions.title: Test media equivalence mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Remove audio, remove video, add essential visuals, add interaction, change language, break tracks, and verify the correct alternatives and access paths.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven time-based media mutations are tested.

evidence.observable: Alternative coverage updates with media type, information, timing, interaction, and language.
evidence.changedCase: Prerecorded media becomes a controlled live fixture.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original alternative set survives every changed medium.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify media before selecting equivalence.

interactions.title: Decide whether to embed
interactions.learnerAction: Compare native local media, link, same-origin iframe, third-party iframe, screenshot, and refused embed against task, control, accessibility, privacy, security, performance, and failure needs.
interactions.artifactChange: Six embed decisions are committed.

evidence.observable: Embed is selected only when its distinct document and capability tradeoffs are justified.
evidence.changedCase: Trusted provider requests new tracking and camera capability.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Iframe is used whenever pasteable code exists.
interactions.correctionRoute: Compare lowest-capability way to meet task.

interactions.title: Author accurate embed title and source
interactions.learnerAction: Embed a controlled exhibit document with exact source, concise purpose title, bounded dimensions, and useful nearby fallback link.
interactions.artifactChange: Exhibit gains a purpose-labelled embedded document.

evidence.observable: Resolved source, request, outer accessible name, inner title distinction, box, fallback link, and reload pass.
evidence.changedCase: Embedded purpose and source document both change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Generic video title or inner page title is reused.
interactions.correctionRoute: Name embed purpose for outer document users.

interactions.title: Inspect iframe origin and documents
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect outer page, iframe element, nested browsing context, embedded document, origin, storage boundary, cookies, network requests, and cross-origin access limits.
interactions.artifactChange: A document-origin map is annotated.

evidence.observable: DOM ownership, accessible name, inner content, origin, state, and access boundaries remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Same-origin fixture becomes cross-origin and then credentialless.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Iframe content is treated as ordinary child HTML.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace browsing context and origin separately.

interactions.title: Constrain iframe sandbox
interactions.learnerAction: Start with sandbox restrictions and lift only exact controlled capabilities required by the exhibit while refusing unnecessary script, form, popup, and navigation powers.
interactions.artifactChange: Embed gains a minimal sandbox capability set.

evidence.observable: Each restriction and lifted token maps to required behavior, blocked behavior, origin context, and residual risk.
evidence.changedCase: Embed requests forms and top navigation after provider change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Empty sandbox or copied token bundle is called secure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Justify each lifted capability independently.

interactions.title: Constrain feature permissions
interactions.learnerAction: Grant no camera, microphone, geolocation, autoplay, fullscreen, or other feature unless exact exhibit behavior requires it and controlled tests justify it.
interactions.artifactChange: Embed permissions policy becomes minimal and explicit.

evidence.observable: Requested, granted, denied, used, and unnecessary capabilities are recorded separately.
evidence.changedCase: Fullscreen becomes required while autoplay and microphone remain refused.

interactions.feedbackTarget: allow list is copied for convenience.
interactions.correctionRoute: Map every capability to necessary user task.

interactions.title: Test referrer loading and failure boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Change referrer policy, lazy loading, viewport position, source origin, blocked framing, missing content, and inner navigation while recording observable effects and limits.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven embed boundary mutations are stored.

evidence.observable: Request referrer, load timing, origin, permissions, navigation, outer fallback, and unreliable load-error signals remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Cross-origin source moves and framing policy changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Load event or visible blank frame proves success or failure.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use network, policy, content, and fallback evidence.

interactions.title: Defend oral-history media exhibit
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and explain boundaries, paths, image purpose, players, controls, sources, loading, fallbacks, captions, transcripts, embed title, origin, sandbox, permissions, privacy, and changes.
interactions.artifactChange: The guided oral-history media checkpoint is stored.

evidence.observable: Reloaded artifacts and evidence demonstrate all six concepts across changed cases.
evidence.changedCase: A new interview and constrained exhibit document are integrated from verified fixtures.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Playable media or visible iframe substitutes for equivalence and boundary evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reopen weakest observable and changed case.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A partially scaffolded public lecture page becomes a controlled media experience with verified sources, captions, transcript, fallback, and a constrained slide embed.
activityDesigns.startingState: Owned lecture media, cue and transcript facts, a controlled slide document, incomplete markup, and reduced inspectors are supplied without final decisions.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved lecture passes all six concept contracts, changed media types, source failures, cue changes, and trust changes with faded support.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports failed observable and lecture-user consequence but no longer supplies final player, alternative, or embed code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Faded hints identify an evidence layer and parallel lecture case while omitting final syntax and permission choices.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires independent minimal repair and changed lecture case before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Complete lecture media foundations
interactions.learnerAction: Complete resource bases, external-content ownership boundaries, and poster or functional image alternatives for lecture player, transcript, and slide embed.
interactions.artifactChange: Six prerequisite records become complete.

evidence.observable: DOM, URLs, requests, decoded resources, boxes, image purpose, and embedded document ownership agree.
evidence.changedCase: Lecture page nests and slide origin changes.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Oral-history paths and purposes are copied.
interactions.correctionRoute: Recompute from lecture documents and tasks.

interactions.title: Build lecture player
interactions.learnerAction: Complete a native video player with user controls, suitable ordered sources, verified dimensions and poster, bounded loading, and useful fallback links.
interactions.artifactChange: Lecture video becomes user controlled and resilient.

evidence.observable: Selection, request, ready state, controls, keyboard, poster, dimensions, fallback, and reload pass.
evidence.changedCase: Preferred format fails and lecture dimensions change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible player or copied attributes pass.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace selected source and every user control.

interactions.title: Test lecture control mutations
interactions.learnerAction: Change autoplay, muted, preload, loading, source support, viewport start, keyboard input, and stalled response while recording exact behavior.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight player mutations are tested.

evidence.observable: Parsed presence, policy, requests, media states, controls, fallback, and user outcomes stay distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Autoplay policy and starting fragment both change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute values are treated as browser guarantees.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect actual media state and user control.

interactions.title: Complete lecture alternatives
interactions.learnerAction: Classify lecture as synchronized prerecorded media and complete coverage for speech, non-speech audio, essential slides, demonstrations, language, and references.
interactions.artifactChange: A complete equivalence plan is stored.

evidence.observable: Captions, transcript, and visual-description plan cover every information channel and task.
evidence.changedCase: A silent demonstration and second language are added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Dialogue transcript alone covers lecture.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory audio, visual, timing, and interaction channels.

interactions.title: Author lecture captions and transcript
interactions.learnerAction: Complete track metadata, synchronized speaker and sound cues, and structured transcript with essential visual details and resource links.
interactions.artifactChange: Lecture gains selectable captions and navigable transcript.

evidence.observable: Track, cues, language, labels, timing, transcript order, visual information, and access paths pass.
evidence.changedCase: Speaker overlap, slide text, and cue timing change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Track presence or raw dialogue dump passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit each cue and information channel.

interactions.title: Decide lecture slide embed
interactions.learnerAction: Compare link, native content, same-origin iframe, and third-party embed, then justify the lowest-capability choice for controlled slides.
interactions.artifactChange: A bounded slide-delivery decision is committed.

evidence.observable: Task, control, accessibility, privacy, security, performance, and failure evidence justify the choice.
evidence.changedCase: Slide provider adds tracking and requests script capability.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Pasteable embed code decides architecture.
interactions.correctionRoute: Choose least-capable sufficient delivery.

interactions.title: Constrain lecture slide iframe
interactions.learnerAction: Author exact source and purpose title, minimal sandbox and feature permissions, bounded referrer and loading choices, responsive box, and fallback link.
interactions.artifactChange: Controlled slides gain a constrained embed.

evidence.observable: Name, origin, restrictions, lifted capabilities, permissions, referrer, request, navigation, box, and fallback pass.
evidence.changedCase: Slides require fullscreen but not autoplay or storage.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Copied sandbox and allow bundles pass.
interactions.correctionRoute: Justify every source, token, and capability.

interactions.title: Test lecture media trust changes
interactions.learnerAction: Move resources, change media type, break cues, add visual information, change iframe origin, request capabilities, block framing, and verify all dependent evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight cross-concept lecture mutations are repaired.

evidence.observable: All and only dependent player, alternative, embed, privacy, and fallback evidence updates.
evidence.changedCase: Mutation order reverses and one source changes twice.

interactions.feedbackTarget: One visible playback test substitutes for all layers.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace each changed dependency and boundary.

interactions.title: Defend public lecture media
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and explain boundaries, paths, image purpose, player controls, sources, loading, captions, transcript, title, origin, sandbox, permissions, privacy, failures, and changes.
interactions.artifactChange: The faded lecture media checkpoint is stored.

evidence.observable: Reloaded lecture and evidence demonstrate all six concepts in a distinct domain.
evidence.changedCase: A new lecture segment and slide document are integrated independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Playable video and visible slides lack equivalence or trust evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reopen weakest changed observable.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A broken media page gains causal repairs and an incident report for resources, native controls, alternatives, and embedded-document trust boundaries.
activityDesigns.startingState: A player and iframe contain wrong paths, boundary myths, decorative poster noise, absent controls, autoplay misuse, incomplete captions, no transcript, generic title, broad permissions, and unreliable failure assumptions.
activityDesigns.completionState: Every fault has earliest cause, minimal repair, preserved unaffected behavior, and changed parallel incident.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback identifies contradicted source, player, cue, transcript, accessibility, origin, permission, privacy, navigation, or failure evidence without revealing repair.
activityDesigns.hintContract: On-request hints narrow incident to one evidence layer and then a smaller parallel fixture.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires cause classification, minimal repair, regression evidence, and changed fault before clinic checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Predict foundation faults
interactions.learnerAction: Predict outcomes for wrong media bases, iframe-as-child-DOM assumptions, and poster or fallback images with changed purpose before inspection.
interactions.artifactChange: Nine prerequisite fault predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each prediction maps to URL, request, DOM ownership, box, image purpose, or accessibility evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Faults exchange resources and document origins.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Every fault is called broken embed.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify path, ownership, and image purpose first.

interactions.title: Repair unlabelled native player
interactions.learnerAction: Repair missing controls, focus failure, autoplay false misuse, unsupported source order, stalled fallback, wrong dimensions, and poster confusion from player evidence.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven player faults receive minimal repairs.

evidence.observable: Source selection, media state, native controls, keyboard, poster, dimensions, and fallback checks pass.
evidence.changedCase: Preferred source and autoplay policy change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad custom player or attribute dump hides cause.
interactions.correctionRoute: Repair earliest failed native contract.

interactions.title: Repair timed-alternative failures
interactions.learnerAction: Repair wrong track kind, bad language label, overlapping cues, missing speakers and sounds, transcript gaps, and absent visual information plan.
interactions.artifactChange: Six equivalence faults receive minimal repairs.

evidence.observable: Track, cues, language, timing, speech, sounds, transcript, visuals, and access paths pass.
evidence.changedCase: Media changes from dialogue video to audio-only demonstration.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid cue file or dialogue-only transcript passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit media type and every information channel.

interactions.title: Inspect overprivileged embed
interactions.learnerAction: Inspect generic title, wrong origin assumptions, same-origin sandbox escape risk, broad allow list, unsafe referrer, top navigation, storage, and unreliable load signals.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight embed faults receive causal labels.

evidence.observable: Purpose name, document, origin, restriction, lifted capability, permission, exposure, navigation, and signal limits are exact.
evidence.changedCase: Provider becomes untrusted and requests camera access.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Sandbox presence is called complete security.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect each capability and residual risk.

interactions.title: Constrain broken embed
interactions.learnerAction: Repair source, purpose title, sandbox, feature permissions, referrer, loading, fallback, responsive box, and failure diagnosis with least capability.
interactions.artifactChange: Embed regains bounded behavior and useful fallback.

evidence.observable: All required behavior works, unnecessary capabilities remain denied, and exposure is bounded.
evidence.changedCase: Only fullscreen becomes newly required after repair.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Removing sandbox or granting every feature restores convenience.
interactions.correctionRoute: Lift one evidenced restriction at a time.

interactions.title: Write media boundary incident report
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and explain paths, ownership, image purpose, player controls, alternatives, iframe title, origin, restrictions, permissions, privacy, repairs, and changed incidents.
interactions.artifactChange: Repaired media page and causal report become clinic checkpoint.

evidence.observable: Reloaded artifacts and report demonstrate all six concepts under failure.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel player and untrusted embed incident is diagnosed independently.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Report lists edits without causes or trust boundaries.
interactions.correctionRoute: Rewrite weakest claim as cause, repair, mutation.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: An independently built language-learning guide uses owned user-controlled media, selectable timed alternatives, navigable transcripts, and one justified constrained pronunciation embed.
activityDesigns.startingState: A learner brief, language fact packet, owned recordings and posters, cue facts, transcript requirements, controlled embed manifest, deterministic failures, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: The saved guide passes all six concept contracts, changed language and media cases, trust mutations, failure behavior, and stakeholder defense without copied starter structure.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback reports only unmet observable and learner consequence; it supplies no final player, caption, transcript, or embed code.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Hints are available only on request and point to an evidence layer or smaller parallel language case without giving code.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss requires independent diagnosis, minimal repair, and changed language-learning case before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Build language media foundations
interactions.learnerAction: Organize recording, video, poster, track, transcript, fallback, and embed references while documenting ownership boundaries and image purposes.
interactions.artifactChange: Independent media resource and boundary map is created.

evidence.observable: DOM, URLs, requests, decoded resources, player boxes, poster alternatives, and embedded documents agree.
evidence.changedCase: Language page nests and pronunciation embed changes origin.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Prior scenario tree or image treatment is copied.
interactions.correctionRoute: Derive every resource and purpose from this brief.

interactions.title: Build language players
interactions.learnerAction: Create native audio and video players with user controls, suitable sources, bounded loading, verified video dimensions and poster, and useful fallback links.
interactions.artifactChange: Language recordings become controllable and resilient.

evidence.observable: Selection, requests, states, controls, keyboard, dimensions, poster, fallback, and reload pass.
evidence.changedCase: Preferred format and video ratio change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Visible player or autoplay is accepted as access.
interactions.correctionRoute: Test selected source and user control.

interactions.title: Test player policy and failure
interactions.learnerAction: Change autoplay, muted, preload, loading, source support, network delay, playback position, and keyboard-only input while recording outcomes.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight independent player mutations are stored.

evidence.observable: Policy, request, ready state, native control, user state, fallback, and limitation evidence remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Starting fragment promotes a formerly deep video.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute presence or pointer success is proof.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect actual state and input behavior.

interactions.title: Plan language media equivalence
interactions.learnerAction: Classify audio-only pronunciation, silent mouth-shape video, synchronized lesson, timed exercise, and text-alternative media before mapping alternatives.
interactions.artifactChange: Five media cases gain independent equivalence plans.

evidence.observable: Speech, sounds, visual articulation, timing, interaction, language, and task all receive appropriate coverage.
evidence.changedCase: Silent video gains narration and exercise gains timed interaction.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Transcript or captions are selected universally.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory each information channel and timing need.

interactions.title: Build multilingual tracks and transcripts
interactions.learnerAction: Author exact track metadata, synchronized speech and sound cues, and structured transcripts with language, speakers, visual pronunciation details, and resource access.
interactions.artifactChange: Lessons gain selectable timed and document alternatives.

evidence.observable: Track, cues, timing, labels, languages, transcript order, visuals, and links pass.
evidence.changedCase: Second caption language and visual-only mouth movement are added.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Machine-like dialogue dump or track count passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit every language and information channel.

interactions.title: Test equivalence under changes
interactions.learnerAction: Remove audio, remove video, change language, add meaningful sounds, alter visual articulation, break cues, and verify alternative coverage and access.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven independent equivalence mutations are tested.

evidence.observable: Alternatives update with content type, language, timing, interaction, and task information.
evidence.changedCase: Prerecorded exercise becomes controlled live practice.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Original alternatives survive changed medium.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reclassify media before repairing coverage.

interactions.title: Build constrained pronunciation embed
interactions.learnerAction: Justify embed versus native or link delivery, then author purpose title, source, minimal sandbox and feature permissions, referrer, loading, bounds, and fallback.
interactions.artifactChange: Guide gains one independently constrained embed.

evidence.observable: Task, name, origin, restrictions, capabilities, permissions, exposure, navigation, loading, box, and fallback pass.
evidence.changedCase: Provider requests microphone and storage after trust change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Pasteable iframe or broad permissions are accepted.
interactions.correctionRoute: Use least-capable delivery and justify each grant.

interactions.title: Run adversarial media changes
interactions.learnerAction: Move resources, change media type, break cues, add visual information, change iframe origin, request capabilities, block framing, and verify every dependency.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight cross-concept changes receive independent repairs.

evidence.observable: All and only dependent player, equivalence, embed, privacy, and fallback evidence updates.
evidence.changedCase: Change order reverses and one media item changes type twice.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Happy-path playback and visible frame pass.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace every affected consumer and boundary.

interactions.title: Defend language-learning guide
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and defend boundaries, paths, image purpose, player control, sources, loading, alternatives, tracks, transcripts, title, origin, sandbox, permissions, privacy, failures, and transfer.
interactions.artifactChange: The independent language media checkpoint is stored.

evidence.observable: Reloaded artifacts, tests, alternatives, and boundary defense demonstrate all six concepts.
evidence.changedCase: An unseen language lesson and controlled embed are integrated without hints.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Playable lesson lacks equivalence or trust evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reopen weakest observable and changed case.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A delayed interleaved retrieval set records media-boundary, resource, image-purpose, player, equivalence, and embed-trust decisions plus corrected changed cases.
activityDesigns.startingState: Unseen player traces, cue timelines, transcript audits, embed manifests, network evidence, and changed media contexts are provided without earlier artifacts or notes.
activityDesigns.completionState: The learner retrieves all six concepts, corrects misconceptions causally, and transfers decisions after delay.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Feedback names missed concept and observable only after commitment and never supplies final code, alternative, permission set, or embed choice.
activityDesigns.hintContract: Optional retrieval hints point to one evidence layer or smaller parallel item and never reveal answer.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A miss routes to one concept-sized correction and different changed retrieval item before original checkpoint reopens.

interactions.title: Predict media ownership boundaries
interactions.learnerAction: Predict DOM ownership, external resources, player controls, poster, track, fallback, iframe document, origin, and page-controlled boxes for eight cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight delayed boundary predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Each answer maps to node, request, decoded resource, box, shadow control, or browsing context evidence.
evidence.changedCase: Media types, embedding modes, and origins change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Rendered controls and inner documents are treated as child DOM.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect ownership for one parallel case.

interactions.title: Retrieve media URL resolution
interactions.learnerAction: Without notes, resolve audio, video, poster, source, track, transcript, fallback, and iframe references from changed document and public bases.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight delayed URL answers are stored.

evidence.observable: Every target follows exact base, segments, case, encoding, query, fragment, and origin.
evidence.changedCase: Documents and resources move in new directions.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Project root or remembered media folder becomes base.
interactions.correctionRoute: Resolve one changed source from exact document.

interactions.title: Correct poster and fallback alternatives
interactions.learnerAction: Correct informative, decorative, functional, text-bearing, and redundant poster or fallback image treatments without confusing them with timed alternatives.
interactions.artifactChange: Five purpose claims gain contextual corrections.

evidence.observable: Image-contributed information or function remains complete and separate from media equivalence.
evidence.changedCase: Poster purpose and nearby text change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Poster alt becomes transcript or player name automatically.
interactions.correctionRoute: Classify image task separately from media content.

interactions.title: Predict native player behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source selection, controls, keyboard, autoplay, muted, preload, loading, ready state, poster, dimensions, playback, and fallback for ten fixtures.
interactions.artifactChange: Ten delayed player predictions are locked.

evidence.observable: Parsed attributes, support, requests, states, policy, input, and user outcomes stay distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Formats, policy, position, and failures change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute presence or first source guarantees behavior.
interactions.correctionRoute: Trace candidates and actual media state.

interactions.title: Correct player failure diagnoses
interactions.learnerAction: Correct unsupported source, failed response, corrupt metadata, stalled load, blocked autoplay, missing controls, wrong dimensions, and fallback diagnoses from traces.
interactions.artifactChange: Eight player claims receive causal corrections.

evidence.observable: Each correction identifies earliest stage, user-control consequence, and minimal recovery.
evidence.changedCase: Faults exchange sources and player states.

interactions.feedbackTarget: All player faults are codec or path errors.
interactions.correctionRoute: Walk selection, load, state, and control evidence.

interactions.title: Predict timed media coverage
interactions.learnerAction: Classify audio-only, video-only, synchronized, live, prerecorded, interactive, and text-alternative cases and choose required information coverage.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven delayed equivalence predictions are committed.

evidence.observable: Every plan follows audio, visuals, timing, interaction, language, task, and conformance context.
evidence.changedCase: Silent media gains speech and timed interaction.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Captions or transcript are universal answer.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inventory all channels before selecting alternatives.

interactions.title: Correct cues and transcripts
interactions.learnerAction: Correct wrong kind, language, label, default, timing, speaker, sound, transcript order, missing visual information, and inaccessible transcript path.
interactions.artifactChange: Ten timed-alternative faults are corrected.

evidence.observable: Track, cues, transcript, access, language, and information coverage pass changed playback.
evidence.changedCase: Cue boundaries, language, and essential visuals change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Valid cue syntax or dialogue dump passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Audit every information channel and access path.

interactions.title: Correct iframe trust assumptions
interactions.learnerAction: Correct title, origin, child-DOM, sandbox, same-origin, feature permission, referrer, lazy loading, navigation, privacy, and failure-event assumptions.
interactions.artifactChange: Eleven embed claims gain bounded corrections.

evidence.observable: Each correction maps to document, origin, accessible name, restriction, capability, exposure, request, or diagnostic limit.
evidence.changedCase: Provider trust and requested permissions change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Sandbox or title is treated as complete safety and access.
interactions.correctionRoute: Inspect exact boundary and capability.

interactions.title: Explain retained media competence
interactions.learnerAction: Save and explain boundaries, paths, image purpose, native control, source behavior, alternatives, cues, transcripts, iframe trust, corrections, and changed retrieval cases.
interactions.artifactChange: The delayed media-retention checkpoint is stored.

evidence.observable: Saved retrieval evidence demonstrates all six concepts without earlier artifacts.
evidence.changedCase: A parallel mixed player and embed set is completed after delay.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Recall confidence substitutes for evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Reopen weakest concept-sized item.

activityDesigns.cumulativeArtifact: A no-hint emergency briefing media checkpoint contains independently authored native players, timed alternatives, constrained embed, deterministic failures, changed cases, and a saved boundary defense.
activityDesigns.startingState: An unseen briefing brief, owned media fixtures, cue facts, transcript requirements, controlled embed manifest, deterministic failures, and empty workspace are provided.
activityDesigns.completionState: Candidate independently demonstrates all six concepts through answers, code, causal debugging, transfer, persistence, and changed-case defense.
activityDesigns.feedbackContract: Assessment feedback records only pass or failed requirement and observable; no canonical player, cue, transcript, permission set, or repair is disclosed.
activityDesigns.hintContract: No instructional hints, staged clues, example answers, or code completion are available during checkpoint.
activityDesigns.correctionContract: A failed item closes and records its evidence gap for later relearning plus a different parallel assessment form.

interactions.title: Classify briefing foundations
interactions.learnerAction: Resolve media and embed references, classify ownership boundaries, and choose poster or fallback image alternatives for twelve changed cases.
interactions.artifactChange: Twelve scored foundation decisions are stored.

evidence.observable: URLs, requests, DOM ownership, boxes, image purpose, accessibility, and embedded documents agree.
evidence.changedCase: Resources, purposes, embedding modes, and origins change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Incorrect base, boundary, or image-purpose decision.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record prerequisite gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Predict briefing player behavior
interactions.learnerAction: Predict source selection, controls, keyboard, boolean playback, preload, loading, ready state, poster, dimensions, playback, and fallback for twelve fixtures.
interactions.artifactChange: Twelve scored player predictions are locked.

evidence.observable: Support, requests, parsed attributes, policy, states, controls, and user outcomes remain distinct.
evidence.changedCase: Formats, policy, viewport position, and failures change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Attribute presence or visible player predicts success.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record player-model gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Author briefing players
interactions.learnerAction: Build native audio and video with controls, suitable sources, bounded loading, verified dimensions and poster, keyboard access, and useful fallback links.
interactions.artifactChange: Briefing media becomes scored and user controlled.

evidence.observable: Selection, requests, states, native controls, input, dimensions, poster, fallback, and reload pass.
evidence.changedCase: Preferred source and video ratio change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Source tags or autoplay substitute for usable player.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record player-authoring gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Debug briefing player failures
interactions.learnerAction: Repair unsupported source, failed response, corrupt metadata, blocked autoplay, missing controls, wrong dimensions, stalled loading, poster failure, and fallback gaps.
interactions.artifactChange: Nine scored player faults receive minimal repairs.

evidence.observable: Each repair clears earliest player failure and preserves user control and alternatives.
evidence.changedCase: Fault order and affected sources change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Broad custom-player rewrite hides causes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record player-debugging gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Plan briefing equivalence
interactions.learnerAction: Classify audio-only, video-only, synchronized, live, prerecorded, interactive, and text-alternative briefings and choose complete information coverage.
interactions.artifactChange: Seven scored equivalence plans are stored.

evidence.observable: Plans follow speech, sounds, visuals, timing, interaction, language, task, and context.
evidence.changedCase: Silent video gains narration and timed interaction.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Captions or transcript are universal selection.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record equivalence-planning gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Author briefing alternatives
interactions.learnerAction: Author track metadata, synchronized speech and sound cues, and navigable transcript with essential visual details, language, structure, and resource access.
interactions.artifactChange: Briefing gains scored timed and document alternatives.

evidence.observable: Track, request, cues, timing, speakers, sounds, transcript, visuals, language, and access pass.
evidence.changedCase: Speaker overlap, language, and visual action change.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Track presence or dialogue dump passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record alternative-authoring gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Evaluate briefing embed trust
interactions.learnerAction: Choose embed, link, native, or refusal and evaluate title, origin, sandbox, feature permissions, referrer, loading, navigation, privacy, performance, and failure boundaries.
interactions.artifactChange: Ten scored embed decisions are recorded.

evidence.observable: Every delivery and capability decision follows task, trust, origin, exposure, and observable limits.
evidence.changedCase: Provider becomes untrusted and requests camera, microphone, and storage.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Pasteable code or sandbox presence passes.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record embed-evaluation gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Debug constrained briefing embed
interactions.learnerAction: Repair wrong source, generic title, origin myth, overbroad sandbox tokens, excessive permissions, unsafe referrer, eager loading, broken fallback, and unreliable failure diagnosis.
interactions.artifactChange: Nine scored embed faults receive bounded repairs.

evidence.observable: Required behavior works, unnecessary capabilities remain denied, exposure is bounded, and diagnostics state limits.
evidence.changedCase: Only fullscreen becomes required after trust review.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Removing restrictions restores convenience.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record embed-debugging gap for relearning.

interactions.title: Submit media equivalence checkpoint
interactions.learnerAction: Save, reload, and defend boundaries, paths, image purpose, player control, sources, loading, alternatives, cues, transcripts, title, origin, sandbox, permissions, privacy, failures, repairs, and transfer.
interactions.artifactChange: Complete no-hint briefing media checkpoint is stored.

evidence.observable: Reloaded artifacts, tests, alternatives, repairs, and boundary defense prove all six concepts independently.
evidence.changedCase: An unseen briefing clip and constrained embed are integrated without support.

interactions.feedbackTarget: Submission lacks user control, equivalence, or trust evidence.
interactions.correctionRoute: Record failed concepts for parallel reassessment.

authorshipBoundary.interpretation: This artifact fixes interaction intent and evidence before authoring; it is neither publishable learner content nor a source for automatic prose generation.

gaps: Independent subject, instructional-design, assessment, accessibility, responsive, security, privacy, performance, and duplication reviews are not yet complete.

Learner-facing copy, owned media fixtures, cue and transcript files, deterministic player and embed traces, canonical answers, executable checks, browser verification, and learner pilots remain unauthored.
